channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [EMAINDIA] Trading Window Closed for EMA India Ltd Until 48 Hours After Announcement
item.description:
EMA India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in securities, in accordance with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015. The closure will begin on Friday, March 13, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the announcement is made public. This decision is pursuant to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015, BSE Circular No. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20 dated April 02, 2019, and the company's own Code of Conduct for regulating, monitoring, and reporting of trading by insiders, and Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. During this period, designated persons and insiders are prohibited from dealing in the shares of the company.

  • EMA India Ltd announces closure of trading window from Friday, March 13, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement is made public
  • Decision in line with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015
  • Compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and BSE Circular No. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20
  • Designated persons and insiders prohibited from dealing in the shares of the company during the closure of the trading window

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EMA INDIA LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PDSL] PDS Limited Acquires Remaining 25% Stake in PDS Radius Brands FZCO, UAE
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PDS Limited has acquired the remaining 25% equity stake in PDS Radius Brands FZCO, UAE (PDS Radius UAE), making it a step-down wholly owned subsidiary. The acquisition, completed on March 9, 2026, aims to simplify the shareholding structure, consolidate ownership, and enable efficient decision-making. PDS Radius UAE is a private company limited by shares, incorporated in UAE on July 3, 2023, and operates in the ready-made garment trading industry. The company had a turnover of INR 6.62 Cr in FY2024-25 and INR 2.80 Cr in FY2023-24.

  • PDS Limited acquires the remaining 25% stake in PDS Radius Brands FZCO, UAE
  • PDS Radius UAE becomes a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of PDS Limited
  • Acquisition aims to simplify shareholding structure and enable efficient decision-making
  • PDS Radius UAE operates in the ready-made garment trading industry
  • PDS Radius UAE had a turnover of INR 6.62 Cr in FY2024-25 and INR 2.80 Cr in FY2023-24

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PDS Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [EMAINDIA] EMA India Ltd. Board Meeting to Discuss Potential Merger by Absorption with Dynalog India Limited
item.description:
EMA India Ltd. has informed BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 18/03/2026. The meeting will inter-alia consider a potential Merger by Absorption of EMA India Ltd. by Dynalog India Limited pursuant to Section 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company will be closed for all the Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons from 13/03/2026 till 48 hours after the announcement is made available to the public.

  • EMA India Ltd. to discuss a potential Merger by Absorption with Dynalog India Limited
  • The merger is pursuant to Section 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013
  • Trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company will be closed for all the Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons from 13/03/2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EMA INDIA LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [EMAINDIA] EMA India Ltd. Board Meeting to Discuss Potential Merger by Absorption with Dynalog India Ltd.
item.description:
EMA India Ltd. has informed BSE that the Board of Directors of the Company will meet on 18/03/2026 to consider and approve a potential Merger by Absorption of EMA India Ltd. by Dynalog India Ltd. pursuant to Section 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company will be closed for all Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons from 13/03/2026 till 48 hours after the announcement is made available to the public.

  • EMA India Ltd. to discuss and consider a potential Merger by Absorption with Dynalog India Ltd.
  • The merger is pursuant to Section 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013.
  • Trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company will be closed for all Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons from 13/03/2026.
  • The trading window will remain closed till 48 hours after the announcement is made available to the public.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EMA INDIA LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [ADVANCE] Advance Agrolife Expands Capacity for PEDA and Pretilachlor Production
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Advance Agrolife Ltd has strengthened its backward integration capabilities with the production of Pretilachlor Technical and its intermediate, PEDA (2,6-Diethyl-N-(2-propoxyethyl) Aniline) at its manufacturing facility located at E-39, RIICO Industrial Area, Bagru (Ext.), Jaipur — 303007, Rajasthan, India. The company will add a proposed capacity of 3,700 MT p.a. for PEDA and 5,000 MT p.a. for Pretilachlor, with an investment of approximately 18.00 Cr and 7.00 Cr respectively. The proposed capacity is to be added within the financial year 2025-26. The rationale behind this expansion is the imposition of anti-dumping duty by the GOI on certain products, which has prompted the company to further strengthen its capabilities.

  • Advance Agrolife Ltd expands production capacity for PEDA and Pretilachlor by 3,700 MT p.a. and 5,000 MT p.a. respectively.
  • The company will invest approximately 18.00 Cr and 7.00 Cr for PEDA and Pretilachlor respectively.
  • The proposed capacity is to be added within the financial year 2025-26.
  • The expansion is a result of the imposition of anti-dumping duty by the GOI on certain products.
  • This capacity expansion strengthens the company's backward integration capabilities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advance Agrolife Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [LUMAXTECH] Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd. Receives Order Sanctioning Scheme of Amalgamation with Lumax Ancillary Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd. has received a copy of the order dated March 11, 2026, passed by the National Company Law Tribunal, New Delhi Bench, sanctioning the Scheme of Arrangement of Amalgamation between Lumax Ancillary Limited and Lumax Auto Technologies Limited. The Scheme aims to simplify the corporate structure, reduce costs, and create synergy benefits for the stakeholders. Lumax Ancillary Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Lumax Auto Technologies Limited, is proposed to be amalgamated with the Transferee Company.

  • Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd. has received an order sanctioning the Scheme of Amalgamation with Lumax Ancillary Limited.
  • The Scheme aims to simplify the corporate structure, reduce costs, and create synergy benefits for the stakeholders.
  • Lumax Ancillary Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Lumax Auto Technologies Limited, is proposed to be amalgamated with the Transferee Company.
  • The amalgamation is expected to bring concentrated management focus, integration, and streamlining of the management structure.
  • The Scheme is anticipated to eliminate a multi-layered structure and reduce managerial overlaps, leading to cost savings and better financial management.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUMAX AUTO TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AVAX] Avax Apparels and Ornaments Ltd Alters Memorandum of Association: Sub-division of Equity Shares from Rs. 10 to Rs. 5 Face Value
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avax Apparels and Ornaments Ltd has announced an alteration in its Memorandum of Association (MoA) during the 03rd Extra-Ordinary General Meeting held on Friday, March 13, 2026. The equity shares of the company with a face value of Rs. 10 were sub-divided into 2 equity shares having a face value of Rs. 5 each. This alteration was made in compliance with the Circulars issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs and SEBI. The decision aims to enhance the liquidity of shares and make them more affordable for investors.

  • Alteration in Memorandum of Association of Avax Apparels and Ornaments Ltd
  • Sub-division of equity shares from Rs. 10 face value to Rs. 5 face value
  • Compliance with SEBI and Ministry of Corporate Affairs Circulars
  • Meeting held on Friday, March 13, 2026
  • Enhancement of share liquidity and affordability

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avax Apparels and Ornaments Ltd | Category: Split

item.title: [TRANWAY] Tranway21 Technologies Ltd Shifts Registered Office within Bengaluru City
item.description:
Tranway21 Technologies Ltd has announced the shifting of its registered office within the local limits of Bengaluru City. The new registered office address is No. 67, 2nd floor, 29th C Cross, Geetha Colony, 4th block, Jayanagar, Bangalore — 560011, effective from 13%* March 2026. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors at its meeting held on 13® March 2026.

  • Tranway21 Technologies Ltd has shifted its registered office within Bengaluru City.
  • The new registered office address is No. 67, 2nd floor, 29th C Cross, Geetha Colony, 4th block, Jayanagar, Bangalore — 560011.
  • The shift will be effective from 13%* March 2026.
  • The decision was approved by the Board of Directors at its meeting held on 13® March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tranway Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MODCL] Modern Engineering And Projects Ltd: Director Jashandeep Singh Resigns Due to Personal Reasons
item.description:
Modern Engineering And Projects Ltd has announced the resignation of Director Jashandeep Singh (DIN: 02357390) with effect from the close of business hours on 13th March, 2026. The resignation is due to personal reasons. Mr. Singh also ceases to be a Member of the Stakeholders Relationship Committee of the Company. The Company has provided the necessary details as required under Schedule 11l — Para A(7B) of Part A of the Listing Regulations.

  • Director Jashandeep Singh resigns from Modern Engineering And Projects Ltd.
  • Resignation effective from the close of business hours on 13th March, 2026.
  • Resignation due to personal reasons.
  • Mr. Singh ceases to be a Member of the Stakeholders Relationship Committee.
  • Company provides necessary details as required under Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Modern Converters Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NHIT] National Highways Infra Trust Discloses Material Issue with Project-wise Valuation of Round 5 Assets
item.description:
🔥 Trending

National Highways Infra Trust has disclosed a material issue, revealing the project-wise break-up of the valuation of the Round 5 assets as of 28th February 2026. The two projects, Amravati Chikali and Gundugolanu - Chinna Avutupalli, have an enterprise value of INR 44,576 million and INR 17,633 million respectively, totaling INR 62,209 million. This information was received by National Highways Infra Investment Managers Private Limited, the Investment Manager to National Highways Infra Trust, via mail dated 13th March 2026.

  • National Highways Infra Trust discloses material issue
  • Reveals project-wise valuation of Round 5 assets
  • Amravati Chikali project has an enterprise value of INR 44,576 million
  • Gundugolanu - Chinna Avutupalli project has an enterprise value of INR 17,633 million
  • Total enterprise value of Round 5 assets is INR 62,209 million

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Highways Infra Trust | Category: Quarterly Result
